CustomField.formula: IF( Serial__c != null && !ISBLANK(Serial__r.Cost_Price__c) , Serial__r.Cost_Price__c * Quantity__c , IF( Material_Batch_Lot__c != null && !ISBLANK(Material_Batch_Lot__r.Cost_Price__c), Material_Batch_Lot__r.Cost_Price__c * Quantity__c , Sales_Order_Line_Item__r.Price_Book_Unit_Cost__c * Quantity__c))
CustomField.label: Cost Price
